# t-doc - Common

[![Publish](https://github.com/t-doc-org/common/actions/workflows/publish.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/t-doc-org/common/actions/workflows/publish.yml)

This package contains the common functionality for documents based on t-doc.

This software is distributed under the [MIT](LICENSE.txt) license.

functions.name: tdoc.common.python.core.public
documentation: Make a function available in the client code environment.

functions.name: tdoc.common.python.core.new_id
documentation: Generate a unique ID, usable in id= attributes.

functions.name: tdoc.common.python.core.render
documentation: Render some HTML in an output block.

functions.name: tdoc.common.python.core.input_line
documentation: Request a single line of text from the user.

functions.name: tdoc.common.python.core.input_text
documentation: Request a multi-line text from the user.

functions.name: tdoc.common.python.core.input_buttons
documentation: Present a list of buttons and wait for the user to click one of them.

functions.name: tdoc.common.python.core.pause
documentation: Present a button, and wait for the user to click it.

functions.name: tdoc.common.python.core.run
documentation: Run a block of client code.

functions.name: tdoc.common.python.core.stop
documentation: Stop a running block of client code.

classes.name: tdoc.common.python.core.OutStream
documentation: An output stream that forwards writes to JavaScript.

functions.name: tdoc.common.util.get_arg_parser
documentation: Get an ArgumentParser class printing errors to the given stream.

functions.name: tdoc.common.util.main
documentation: Decorate fn as a main() function.

functions.name: tdoc.common.cli.main
documentation: TODO: Implement incremental builds, by copying previous build output
